mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(order_id, -3)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM material_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_order ( order_id, supplier_id, order_date, order_status, expected_arrived_date, created_by, note ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{supplierId}, #{orderDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{orderStatus}, #{expectedArrivedDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{createdBy}, #{note} )

INSERT INTO material_order_item ( order_item_id, order_id, material_id, order_quantity, unit_price, total_price, warehouse_code ) VALUES ( #{orderItemId}, #{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{orderQuantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{warehouseCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.material_name AS materialName, s.supplier_id AS supplierId, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, si.unit_price AS unitPrice, m.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id JOIN supplier s ON si.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY s.supplier_name ASC

SELECT si.supplier_id, si.material_id, si.unit_price, COALESCE(m.warehouse_code, 'WH001') FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON m.material_id = si.material_id WHERE si.supply_available = 'Y' AND si.material_id IN
#{mid}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CONCAT( 'PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD( IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(order_id, 16, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) FROM material_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
INSERT INTO material_order ( order_id, supplier_id, order_date, order_status, expected_arrived_date, created_by, note ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{supplierId}, NOW(), #{orderStatus}, #{expectedArrivedDate}, #{createdBy}, #{note} )
